pageContext.name: Expert on the Occult
pageContext.description: 'I'm sorry. I thought we were talking about folklore.'  Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Expert on the Occult Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Expert on the Occult print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
